commit_message:
AES DV: enhance aes_seq_item randomization + constraints for coverage AES DV: enhance aes_seq_item randomization + constraints for coverage This PR updates hw/ip/aes/dv/env/aes_seq_item.sv to improve randomization and constraints for better functional coverage.

Highlights:
- Optional enable knobs: randomize_operation_en, randomize_key_len_en, randomize_data_len_en (default-off)
- New rand selectors and dist constraints for operation, key_len, data_len
- Data/IV pattern selectors to explore
